title: Ultimate swords
description: Mod add hard to craft but very OP sword!
body: The mod you are about to install introduces a brand new imbedded sword into the game. However, to create this unique sword, you will need to put in quite a bit of effort, as it consists of nine other powerful swords. Each of these swords requires significant effort to obtain the essential items needed for crafting the final sword. But trust me, the ultimate sword is worth all the hard work! This mod can serve as a fantastic addition to your builds or be used independently to simplify gameplay during the final stages of the game. Additionally, it can provide an interesting challenge for those seeking new trials! It is recommended to use JEI for convenient management of items and crafting.
